Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

Mr. Der provided the Court with a breakdown of the funding formula/distribution calculations as set forth on the record, stated that they had come up with a $14,000 difference, that the difference was made up in cash, and that the distribution was made immediately after the Court order was signed. Mr. Der stated that the distribution was based on the value at the end of the first accounting which was October 31, 2006. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.
